variants.title: MicroFit® UltraGen III MFHLP33377 Pressure Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 2.0045G10A000P
variants.description: The MICROFIT® UltraGen III MFHLP33377 is the MICROFIT® approved replacement to the Eppensteiner 2.0045G10A000P. Engineered and manufactured in Great Britain the MFHLP33377
specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ

variants.title: Filtrec DVD20045B10B Pressure Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 20045G10A000P
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec DVD20045B10B. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the DVD20045B10B provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ
